Registry / Terms / base conditions

base conditions

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01651 · 11 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 9 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency

#02280
2.41
specified conditions under which the measured volume of liquid isconverted (example: temperature, density, pressure).
pending

#01545
T.c.3.1
specified values of the conditions to which the measured quantity of liquid is converted (example: base temperature and base pressure of the liquid)
pending

( conditions to which the measured volume of gas is converted examples: base temperature and base pressure).

the specified conditions of temperature and pressure to which the measured volume is converted
pending

the specified conditions to which a measured quantity is converted, e.g. base temperature and base pressure
pending

specified values of the conditions to which the measured quantity of liquid is converted (example: base temperature and base pressure of the liquid)
